# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

services:
  - name: user-service
    url: user-service.example.com

  - name: product-service
    url: product-service.example.com

routes:
  - name: user-routes
    paths:
      - /users
    service: user-service

  - name: product-routes
    paths:
      - /products
    service: product-service

plugins:
  - name: request-validator
    config:
      validators:
        - name: required-fields
          fields:
            - name: email
            - name: password

  - name: rate-limiting
    config:
      limit: 100
      window: 60

  - name: cors
    config:
      origins: '*'
      methods: '*'
      headers: '*'
